SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-04-03: U.S. payrolls rose by 178,000 in March, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.. 2026-04-03: U.S. fighter jet shot down in Iran, one crew member rescued, MS NOW reports: It is unclear if the plane was shot down or went down for another reason.. 2026-04-03: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done': The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran \extremely hard\" for the next two or three weeks.". 2026-04-03: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later: A year after his \liberation day,\" Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.". 2026-04-03: Meta, Google under attack as court cases bypass 30-year-old legal shield: Internet platforms have long been able to rely on special protections to avoid liability for what takes place on their sites. But that may be changing. . 2026-04-03: One year of 'TACO': How the trade has fared since 'liberation day': Since “liberation day,” betting on the “Trump Always Chickens Out” theory has been a way to win in the market. . 2026-04-03: U.S. judge upholds block on subpoenas to Fed's Powell, teeing up likely appeal: A U.S. judge upheld block on subpoenas to Fed's Powell, teeing up a likely appeal.. 2026-04-03: United unveils basic Polaris business fare in premium cabin overhaul: United is overhauling its fare classes, offering cheaper business class and premium economy fares that are more restrictive.. 2026-04-03: Investors are waiting for a better place to step in after this week's bounce. Here's what's ahead: There is still a sizeable camp that warn against trading this moment, saying saying equities have to consolidate further before this chapter closes. . 2026-04-03: The cost to fly private is up as much as 20% with fuel prices soaring: Deep-pocketed travelers are less likely to get priced out as airfares rise, but they have to navigate unexpected fees related to the Iran war and rising fuel costs.. 2026-04-03: 'Chasing vibes' — OpenAI's M&A strategy gets more confusing with TBPN purchase: Over 10 months after shelling out an eye-popping $6.4 billion for Jony Ive's nascent devices startup, OpenAI announced it's buying media company TBPN. . 2026-04-03: I study happiness for a living: The most emotionally secure people share these 7 'quietly powerful' traits: Happiness researcher Jessica Weiss reveals the quiet but powerful traits that emotionally secure people have in common. . 2026-04-03: Trump is calling for a major increase in defense spending alongside cuts in domestic spending: President Donald Trump is asking Congress to boost defense spending to $1.5 trillion, the largest such request in decades, according to his budget request.. 2026-04-03: Wall Street snapped its 5-week losing streak. Here are 3 themes that caught our eye: The stock market finally posted its first winning week since the U.S.-Iran war broke out.. 2026-04-03: These master's degrees lead to fast-growing, in-demand jobs—but offer low ROI: Getting a master's degrees in social work and psychology may not deliver the best return on investment. But job placement and fulfillment may come easier.. 2026-04-03: Army chief of staff fired by Hegseth, sources say: U.S. Army Chief of Staff Randy George was fired on Thursday by Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, three U.S. defense officials told Reuters, in the latest purge among the Pentagon's most senior ranks.. 2026-04-03: Chinese chip firms hit record high revenue driven by the AI boom and U.S. curbs: Chinese chip companies have benefited from strong domestic demand for AI as U.S. tech curbs have bolstered local firms. . 2026-04-03: Asia-Pacific markets mostly rise in Easter trade on hopes for Hormuz reopening: South Korea's Kospi led gains in the region while Japan's Nikkei 225 also opened higher. The Australian and Hong Kong markets were closed for the Easter weekend.. 2026-04-03: South Korea, France agree to deepen defense cooperation amid Middle East conflict: French officials have said the trip aims to strengthen France's strategic and economic role in the region at a time of \strong international and regional tensions.\"". 2026-04-03: Japan's Sakura Internet jumps 20% as Microsoft plans $10 billion AI push with SoftBank: Microsoft said it plans to invest $10 billion in Japan between 2026 and 2029 to build AI infrastructure. . 2026-04-03: Microsoft executive touts Copilot sales traction as AI anxiety weighs on stock: Analysts have said adoption of the $30-per-month Microsoft 365 Copilot is in the early stage.. 2026-04-03: Myanmar junta chief Min Aung Hlaing elected president by pro-military parliament: The 69-year-old general orchestrated a 2021 coup against the administration of Aung San Suu Kyi, sparking widespread protests.. 2026-04-03: Tiger Woods called Trump after DUI crash, he told cop on bodycam video: President Trump called Tiger Woods a close friend after the golfer's auto crash in Jupiter, Fla., last week. Woods is dating the ex-wife of Donald Trump Jr.. 2026-04-03: Warner, Schiff probe potential insider trading in government : The lawmakers also cited a recent report that a Pete Hegseth-linked broker sought to make a multimillion-dollar investment in a defense-linked ETF in February.. 2026-04-03: United Airlines hikes checked bag fee by $10 as fuel prices continue to climb: United Airlines became the second U.S. carrier in a week to raise check bag fees as the industry grapples with a more than 80% jump in jet fuel costs.
